headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://contextive.info; connect-src 'self' https://*.vercel-insights.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://contextive.substack.com; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
